title: 杯弓蛇影
meaning: 比喻因疑神疑鬼而引起恐惧

scenes.title: 看到蛇影
scenes.prompt: A person seeing a snake shadow in their wine cup, cartoon style, scared expression
scenes.narration: 有个人喝酒时，看到杯中有蛇的影子。

scenes.title: 疑心生病
scenes.prompt: A person in bed sick from worry, cartoon style, worried scene
scenes.narration: 他疑心很重，回家后就生病了。

scenes.title: 真相大白
scenes.prompt: A person relieved after discovering it was just a bow reflection, cartoon style
scenes.narration: 后来发现那只是弓的倒影，他的病立刻就好了。
